title: cordyline duffii
intro: Cordyline duffii is a species of flowering plant in the asparagus family that is native to New Zealand and is known for its unique and attractive foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cordyline duffii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
